valuations.indexSubtitle: Loftly samples real redemptions and publishes the 80th percentile — not the mean, not the median.

detail.methodologyBody: We take the 80th percentile across {samples} recent redemptions — the level a deliberate optimizer can reasonably hit, not the average and not the fantasy best-case.

dataExport.title: Download your data
dataExport.desc: Get a JSON + CSV copy of everything we hold on you. PDPA §7 right-to-access, ready in 24h.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.desc: Start the 14-day erasure grace period. You can cancel any time before it completes.

account.loadError: We couldn't load your profile right now — your settings are still accessible below.

dataExport.title: Download your personal data (PDPA)
dataExport.intro: You have the right to a copy of your data under PDPA §7 — we'll package it as JSON + CSV and deliver a download link within 24 hours.
dataExport.notAvailableBody: Self-service data export will be available after the Month 3 soft-launch — in the meantime, contact us for a manual export.
dataExport.errorGeneric: Couldn't submit your request — please try again

delete.title: Delete your account
delete.warningBody: You can cancel any time during the grace period — after 14 days your data is permanently erased per PDPA §7.
delete.emailConfirmLabel: Type your registered email (to confirm identity)
delete.pendingBody: Your data will be erased in
delete.cancelledNotice: Deletion cancelled — your account is active.
delete.completedNotice: Your account has been permanently deleted.
delete.legalHoldBody: Consent records and commission accounting are retained for 7 years per PDPA and accounting regulations.
delete.notAvailableBody: Self-service account deletion will be available after the Month 3 soft-launch — contact us for an early-deletion request.
delete.errorGeneric: Couldn't submit your request — please try again

legal.affiliateDisclosureInline: Loftly earns commission from the bank — no extra cost to you
legal.affiliateDisclosureFull: Loftly earns a commission when you apply for a card through our links, at no extra cost to you. Our current partners include MoneyGuru, KTC, and UOB — we disclose all commercial relationships so you can evaluate our recommendations neutrally. Our analyses and scores are not adjusted in favor of any specific partner.
legal.placeholderNotice: This policy is in draft — the final Thai-localized copy is pending legal review ahead of the Month 3 soft-launch.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Loftly is free while we build — tell us if premium features are worth your while.
pricing.free_tier_description: Every Loftly feature available today, at no cost. No credit card, no sign-up required.
pricing.feature_alerts: Transfer-bonus alerts, pushed within minutes of announcement
pricing.feature_unified_balance: Unified points balance across all your loyalty programs
pricing.feature_api: API access for your own dashboards

invite.title: Invite-only preview
invite.subtitle: Loftly is in a closed soft launch. Enter the invite code we sent you to continue.
invite.codeHint: Case-sensitive. The code is in the email from the Loftly team.
invite.errorInvalid: That code isn't valid or has been revoked. Double-check the email we sent, or reply to it for a new code.
invite.noAccess: Don't have a code yet? We're letting in a small wave at a time — reply to the waitlist email and we'll follow up.

page.title: Loftly is invite-only right now
page.subtitle: We're running a closed soft launch with 50 invites per wave. Three ways from here — enter a code, join the waitlist, or follow along until the next wave opens.

joinWaitlist.title: Request a code (waitlist)
joinWaitlist.body: Drop your email and we'll send a code in the next wave. No spam — one email when a slot opens.
